scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/core -w packages/providers -w packages/sdk -w packages/plugins
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace=apps/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace=apps/desktop
scripts.test: npm test -w packages/core -w packages/providers -w packages/sdk -w packages/plugins -w apps/desktop
